## Diagram 2

```mermaid
classDiagram
  class ShipmentDatabase {
    +__init__(name)
    +get_cursor()
  }
  class OrganizationDB {
    +get_org_by_fv_id(cursor, fv_id)
  }
  class UsersModule {
    +user_has_organization(user, org_id)
    +sync_user(connector, user_id)
    +get_auth0_user_by_email(email)
    +get_auth0_user_by_id(user_id)
    +get_privileges_by_organization(connector, email)
  }
  class FVAuthorization {
    +switch_user_active_organization(app_metadata, org_id)
  }
  class Script {
    -connector
    -organization_id
    +printUser(user)
    +lambda_handler()
  }
  class LocalTest {
    +test_carrier_organization_id
    +test_shipper_organization_id
  }

  Script --> ShipmentDatabase
  Script --> OrganizationDB
  Script --> UsersModule
  Script --> FVAuthorization
  Script --> LocalTest
  OrganizationDB --> ShipmentDatabase : uses cursor
  UsersModule --> ShipmentDatabase : uses connector
  UsersModule --> OrganizationDB : queries org info
```
